falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm a market top is forming, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 makes a new 200-day low with >1.5% volume surge
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakdown with heavy volume would invalidate the pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving the current call wrong by showing a clear bearish acceleration.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Nasdaq Composite breaks above its 200-day moving average by 3%+
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A decisive bullish breakout would indicate a phase change to a new uptrend, falsifying the 'HOLD' signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
